name: Sany Heavy Industry Co., Ltd
summary: Sany Heavy Industry Co., Ltd. engages in the research and development, manufacture, and sale of concrete machinery, excavators, hoisting machinery, pile driving machinery, and road construction machinery worldwide. It offers truck mounted and stationary concrete pumps, concrete batching plants, asphalt batching plants, crawler cranes, truck cranes, rotary drilling rigs, compactors, pavers, graders, and other products, as well as services and parts. The company was founded in 1994 and is headquartered in Beijing, China.
